name: Josselyn Brueske
narrative: Mathematics Teacher at Austin Achieve Public Schools, serving as Grade Level Chair (Jun 2022-present) and 5th Grade Math Teacher (Jun 2021-present). Previously worked at Harmony Public Schools as 4th Grade Math Teacher, Mentor Teacher, Teacher, and 3rd Grade Teacher from Aug 2017-Jun 2021. B.A. in Psychology from Texas State University.
